[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010101 3
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 010111101 6
4 000001100 2
5 001010011 4
6 011000101 4
7 111010101 6

70 07 010011101 5
